calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-011 second source info gain: z_harm_a encodes temporal harm info z_harm_s cannot
items.notes: 2-condition (WITH_HISTORY vs WITHOUT_HISTORY) x 3 seeds. Info gain criterion: z_harm_a predicts accumulated_harm better than z_harm_s. Fixes flawed D3 forward-probe from 241a (EMA smoothness confound). C1: stream_corr<0.85, C2: info_gain>0.05, C3: r2_s_to_a<0.80, C4: accum_loss<0.05.

items.title: SD-021: descending pain modulation during commitment
items.notes: 2-condition (NO_DESCENDING, WITH_DESCENDING) x 3 seeds. Fix: grid_size->size, WORLD_OBS_DIM 50->250, correct env/agent API.

items.title: MECH-220: cross-stream harm hub coordination
items.notes: 3-condition (NO_HUB, S_TO_A_HUB, BIDI_HUB) x 3 seeds. Fix: grid_size->size, WORLD_OBS_DIM 50->250, correct env/agent API.
